inputs.label: Annual Income
inputs.businessContext: The policyholder's current annual after-tax income that needs replacement.

inputs.label: Years of Need
inputs.businessContext: Number of years the dependents will require income replacement.

inputs.label: Current Savings & Investments
inputs.businessContext: Total liquid assets that can be used toward future needs.

inputs.label: Outstanding Debts (e.g., mortgage, loans)
inputs.businessContext: Total debts that must be paid off upon death.

inputs.label: Future Education Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Estimated total cost for children's education.

inputs.label: Final Expenses (funeral, estate settlement)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated cost for funeral and estate settlement.
